title: cyclosorus multilineatus
intro: Cyclosorus multilineatus, also known as the many-lined fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus multilineatus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce swelling and pain. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus multilineatus typically involve drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
